registerAccount.title: Register Account
registerAccount.content: Fill in basic information, verify your email, and complete registration.

browseApi.title: Browse API
browseApi.content: View API documentation, learn about features, and choose the right API.

startIntegration.title: Start Integration
startIntegration.description: Get your consumer key and start using
startIntegration.content: Apply for a consumer key and follow the documentation to integrate.

quickStartDesc: Start using our API products in minutes and build powerful applications
developerDocsDesc: Detailed API documentation with descriptions, parameters, and response examples for all endpoints.
sdkAndToolsDesc: SDKs in multiple programming languages to simplify API integration.
needHelpDesc: Our technical support team is always ready to help you integrate and use our API products smoothly.
